name: Otherworldly Carnival + Big Announcement
description:
рҹҺӘ рҹҮівҖҢрҹҮӘвҖҢрҹҮјвҖҢ рҹҮ°вҖҢрҹҮ®вҖҢрҹҮ©вҖҢ рҹҮҙвҖҢрҹҮівҖҢ рҹҮ№вҖҢрҹҮӯвҖҢрҹҮӘвҖҢ рҹҮјвҖҢрҹҮӘвҖҢрҹҮ®вҖҢрҹҮ·вҖҢрҹҮ©вҖҢ рҹҮ§вҖҢрҹҮұвҖҢрҹҮҙвҖҢрҹҮЁвҖҢрҹҮ°вҖҢвқ“

в—Ҷ вқӢ в—Ү вқӢ в—Ҷ

You're a young [sphinx/selkie/changeling/other] who escaped your controlling [family/cult/government facility] and heard the carnival is a safe haven. But integrating isn't easy: the werewolf pack has clique dynamics, the ghost twins keep commenting on your "life force", and Miss Daemona wants to interview you with her soul-reading tea set. Meanwhile, mysterious figures in black SUVs are asking questions about you in nearby towns.

рҹҢҹ в—Ү вқӢ в—Ү рҹҢҹ

Trying to fit in with supernatural theater kids isn't easy while your tragic backstory keeps interfering with small talk and orientation meetings. рҹӨ·рҹҸ»

вңҰ в—Ҷ вң§ в—Ҷ вңҰ

WHO YOU ARE: young supernatural creature fleeing persecution

HOW TO PLAY:

  • Audition to become a performer and find your chosen family

  • Work backstage and uncover the carnival's underground network

  • Try to evade your mysterious pursuers

вӯҗ в—Ү вқӢ в—Ү вӯҗ

ALL EXTENDED 9 SCENARIOS

[1] The Accidental Intern - You responded to a Craigslist ad for "Circus Administrative Assistant" without reading the fine print. It's your first day, and... good luck.

[2] The Runaway Cryptid (original) - You're a young supernatural creature fleeing persecution and heard the carnival is a safe haven. But integrating isn't easy while your tragic backstory keeps interfering with small talk and orientation meetings.

[3] The Romantic Disaster - You're a supernatural dating app developer who has created "SupernaturalSpark," the Tinder for monsters, and the carnival performers are your beta testers. But your app keeps crashing from magical interference.

[4] The Influencer Invasion - A team of paranormal investigation YouTubers infiltrates the carnival during a performance, livestreaming everythi
